positive: A central, stylized abstract representation of interconnected mountain peaks and flowing waves, designed as a minimalist celestial map. The peaks should feature crisp, sharp lines and a monochromatic color palette of deep indigo, slate gray, and vibrant teal. Include subtle elements of geometric constellations and crescent moons orbiting the peaks. The overall composition must have strong, high-contrast silhouettes and be perfect for a circular repeat print on apparel. Clean vector aesthetic, graphic novel illustration style, negative space emphasis, symmetrical composition, volumetric lighting, digital ink wash texture.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low contrast, gradient sky, photorealism, logos, watermark, messy, noise, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, painting, smoke
